movie.actors: Jim Varney, Eartha Kitt, Austin Nagler, Shay Astar
movie.plot: Ernest accidentally unleashes an ugly troll that plots to transform children into wooden dolls in the town of Briarville, Missouri.
movie.title: Ernest Scared Stupid
movie.writer: John R. Cherry III (story), Coke Sams (story), Charles Gale (screenplay), Coke Sams (screenplay)
